snippet.title: Moira Dela Torre - Paubaya | Official Music Video | feat. Joshua Garcia & Julia Barretto
snippet.description:
At dito nagtatapos ang kabanata ng Patawad. 
Sana naramdaman mo yung "kalma. Yung lubag ng loob." 

Sana lahat tayo ay lumabas na handang sumugal at magmahal muli. 
At maalala natin palagi na ang pag-asa ay hindi isang pantasya na binubulag tayo sa katotohanan. Dahil lahat ng bagay ay may dahilan. 
Hindi ka nag-iisa.
Kaya ang tanging panalangin na isinisigaw ko sa hangin
ay sana sa pagsalubong natin sa bagong umaga, 
Tayo'y natutong magpatawad at humingi ng tawad;
Magpalaya at lumaya; 
at higit sa lahat, natutong ipaubaya ang lahat sa Kanya. 


Hanggang sa susunod na kabanata. 
Salamat sa'yo.

**english subtitles are available**

snippet.title: Magnitude 7.3 earthquake hits Japan off Fukushima coast | DW News
snippet.description:
A magnitude 7.3 earthquake struck northeastern Japan, off the coast of Fukushima, on Saturday night. More than 130 people have been reported injured and some 860,000 homes are without power. The Meteorological Agency believes this was an aftershock from the massive earthquake that hit the region in 2011.
The initial quake was followed by a series of aftershocks.
Back in 2011, a similar earthquake in the same region triggered a tsunami. That caused a severe nuclear accident. The Fukushima nuclear power plant had a meltdown that leaked radiation into the atmosphere and the Pacific Ocean. The clean-up from that disaster will likely take another 30 to 40 years. 
Japanese Prime Minister Yoshihide Suga has dismissed worries that  Fukushima's nuclear plant could suffer a new leak from this latest quake.
As residents began cleaning up the aftermath, officials are calling on people to remain on the alert for further aftershocks in the coming weeks.

snippet.title: Ruffa Gutierrez, BINUNYAG ang PAGUUSAP nilang MULI ng kanyang EX-HUSBAND na si Yilmas Bektas
snippet.description:
Inamin ng actress na si Ruffa Gutierrez na muli na silang nagkakausap ng masinsinan ng kanyang ex-husband na si Yilmas Bektas, isang Turkish Businessman.

Ikinasal sina Ruffa at Yilmaz, isang Turkish businessman, sa isang mala-fairytale wedding ceremony noong March 25, 2003.

Sinundan ito ng isang Muslim rites na ginanap sa Arcarkent, Istanbul, Turkey noong September 4, 2003.

Nagkaroon sila ng dalawang anak na babae ni RuffaвАФsina Lorin, 17, at Venice, 16. Mayo 8, 2007 nila ini-announce ang kanilang paghihiwalay.

Panoorin ang pahayag ni Ruffa sa videong ito.

Disclaimer: I do not own any images in this video, no copyright infringement intended

snippet.title: NETS at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 18, 2021
snippet.description:
NETS at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 18, 2021

Led by James HardenвАЩs 23 PTS, 5 REB and 11 AST, the Brooklyn Nets defeated the Los Angeles Lakers, 109-98. Additionally for the Nets, Joe Harris added 21 PTS and Kyrie Irving recorded 16 PTS and 7 REB in the victory. For the Lakers, Lebron James tallied a game-high 32 PTS, 8 REB, 7 AST, and surpassed 35,000 career points.

Next Games:
Brooklyn Nets at LA Clippers - Feb. 21 at 8pm/et on ESPN
Miami Heat at Los Angeles Lakers - Feb. 20 at 8:30pm/et on ABC

For the Lakers, Lebron James tallied a game-high 32 PTS, 8 REB, 7 AST, and surpassed 35,000 career points.

snippet.title: Duterte slams Robredo, Lacson for likening his VFA threat to extortion
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Watch NASAвАЩs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover вАУ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space вАУ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAвАЩs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: DOTA: Dragon's Blood | Teaser | Netflix
snippet.description:
The sweeping fantasy series based off of the DOTA2 universe tells the story of Davion, a renowned Dragon Knight devoted to wiping the scourge from the face of the world. Following encounters with a powerful, ancient eldwurm as well as the noble Princess Mirana on a secret mission of her own, Davion becomes embroiled in events much larger than he could have ever imagined.
 
Premieres March 25, only on Netflix.

snippet.title: REACTING TO THE CRAZIEST RUMORS ABOUT ME | Heart Evangelista
snippet.description:
ItвАЩs been a year since we last did an assumption video and today, IвАЩm adding a little twist by reacting to the craziest rumors youвАЩve heard about me over the years. Enjoy! рЯШЙ

LOVE MARIE ONGPAUCO-ESCUDERO (known in the Philippine entertainment industry as Heart Evangelista) started her career at the age of 13 as a commercial model and actress. Her 20 years of hard work paved the way to numerous acting and hosting projects and awards. Through the years, she has evolved from being a professional actor and television host to a sought-after international and local brand endorser, sold-out visual artist, best-selling author, fashion influencer, beauty icon, and entrepreneur. She is one of the countryвАЩs most recognized celebrities, and advocates for childrenвАЩs health and education, individuals with special needs, and animal welfare. She wishes to share these passions with the world through this platform.

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: Disney's Cruella | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Brilliant. Bad. A little bit mad. May 2021.

Academy Award¬Ѓ winner Emma Stone (вАЬLa La LandвАЭ) stars in DisneyвАЩs вАЬCruella,вАЭ an all-new live-action feature film about the rebellious early days of one of cinemas most notorious вАУ and notoriously fashionable вАУ villains, the legendary Cruella de Vil. вАЬCruella,вАЭ which is set in 1970s London amidst the punk rock revolution, follows a young grifter named Estella, a clever and creative girl determined to make a name for herself with her designs. She befriends a pair of young thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they are able to build a life for themselves on the London streets. One day, EstellaвАЩs flair for fashion catches the eye of the Baroness von Hellman, a fashion legend who is devastatingly chic and terrifyingly haute, played by two-time Oscar¬Ѓ winner Emma Thompson (вАЬHowards End,вАЭ вАЬSense & SensibilityвАЭ). But their relationship sets in motion a course of events and revelations that will cause Estella to embrace her wicked side and become the raucous, fashionable and revenge-bent Cruella.
¬†
DisneyвАЩs вАЬCruellaвАЭ is directed by Craig Gillespie (вАЬI TonyaвАЭ) from a screenplay by Dana Fox and Tony McNamara, story by Aline Brosh McKenna and Kelly Marcel & Steve Zissis. It was produced by Andrew Gunn (вАЬFreaky FridayвАЭ), Marc Platt (вАЬMary Poppins ReturnsвАЭ) and Kristin Burr (вАЬChristopher RobinвАЭ), with Emma Stone, Michelle Wright, Jared LeBoff and Glenn Close serving as executive producers. Two-time Oscar¬Ѓ- winning costume designer Jenny Beavan (вАЬMad Max: Fury Road,вАЭ вАЬA Room with a ViewвАЭ) creates the dazzling and imaginative costumes, which take on a life of their own.

For more information on вАЬCruella,вАЭ follow us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DisneyCruellaDeVil
Twitter:¬†https://twitter.com/cruella
Instagram:¬†https://www.instagram.com/disneycruella
YouTube:https://youtube.com/disneymovietrailersвАЛ
Hashtag: #Cruella

snippet.title: Ben&Ben - Inevitable | Official Lyric Video (Vertical)
snippet.description:
Ben&Ben - Inevitable | Official Lyric Video (Vertical)

In collaboration with Smart Philippines in a campaign featuring Hyun Bin & Son Ye-Jin (BinJin).

Something about
the way you move
softened these eyes
and cracked the walls that hid my truth 

I don't know how
your fine mystery
knew all my doubts,
and what to say to set me free 

Inevitable
Even if I tried to fight it
No one ever crashed their tide in me
this hard 

Inevitable
We don't have to chase the feeling
Just let these moments happen 
and let go 

Then we'll know
Then we'll know 

Closer we flow,
a day at a time
but if you should leave
be on your way, I might be fine 

So take what you want
you know that I am yours
My cup is full
and so I want to fill you more 

Inevitable
Even if I tried to fight it
No one ever crashed their tide in me
this hard 

Inevitable
We don't have to chase the feeling
Just let these moments happen 
and let go 

Then we'll know
Then we'll know 
Then we'll know
Then we'll know 

What do I do?
What do I do?
What do I do?
When my truth is you

What do I do?
What do I do?
When my truth is you 

Inevitable
Even if I tried to fight it
No one ever crashed their tide in me
this hard

Just let these moments happen 
and let go 

Then we'll know
Then we'll know

snippet.description:
Rappers CLR and Omar Baliw perform "K&B II" live on the Wish 107.5 Bus! Laid over engaging beats, the lyrics of this rap piece ruminate on the themes of chasing after one's dreams and appreciating those who stick through thick and thin.

This Wishclusive is brought to you by Puregold. Subscribe at www.youtube.com/user/PuregoldChannel for more panalo surprises!

Omar Baliw

#WISHclusive

***
Wish 107.5 is an all-hits FM radio station based in Quezon City, Philippines. It has truly gone out, beyond the conventional, to provide multiple platforms where great Filipino talents can perform and showcase their music. With the Wish 107.5 Bus, people now don't need to buy concert tickets just to see their favorite artists perform on stage.  

However, innovation doesnвАЩt stop in just delivering the coolest musical experience вАФ Wish 107.5 has set the bar higher as it tapped the power of technology to let the Filipino artistry shine in the global stage. With its intensified investment in its digital platforms, it has transformed itself from being a local FM station to becoming a sought-after WISHclusive gateway to the world.

For more information, visit www.wish1075.com. For all-day and all-night wishful music, tune in via your radio or download the Wish 107.5 app (available for both iOS and Android users).

Feel free to SHARE this video but DO NOT REUPLOAD. Thank you!

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвАЩs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT

snippet.title: G League Ignite vs. Santa Cruz Warriors - Condensed Game
snippet.description:
The NBA G League is the NBA's official minor league. Fans can get a glimpse at the players, coaches and officials competing to ascend to the NBA's rank. With 40 percent of players on start-of-season NBA rosters boasting NBA G League experience when the 2018-19 season tipped off in October, the NBA G League YouTube Channel is the best place to see the future now.

The NBA G League consists of 27 teams for the 2018-19 season, all singly affiliated with an NBA franchise: Agua Caliente Clippers of Ontario (Los Angeles Clippers), Austin Spurs (San Antonio Spurs), Canton Charge (Cleveland Cavaliers), Capital City Go-Go (Washington Wizards), Delaware Blue Coats (Philadelphia 76ers), Erie BayHawks (Atlanta Hawks), Fort Wayne Mad Ants (Indiana Pacers), Grand Rapids Drive (Detroit Pistons), Greensboro Swarm (Charlotte Hornets), Iowa Wolves (Minnesota Timberwolves), Lakeland Magic (Orlando Magic), Long Island Nets (Brooklyn Nets), Maine Red Claws (Boston Celtics), Memphis Hustle (Memphis Grizzlies) Northern Arizona Suns (Phoenix Suns), Oklahoma City Blue (Oklahoma City Thunder), Raptors 905 (Toronto Raptors), Rio Grande Valley Vipers (Houston Rockets), Salt Lake City Stars (Utah Jazz), Santa Cruz Warriors (Golden State Warriors), Sioux Falls Skyforce (Miami Heat), South Bay Lakers (Los Angeles Lakers), Stockton Kings (Sacramento Kings), Texas Legends (Dallas Mavericks), Westchester Knicks (New York Knicks) and Wisconsin Herd (Milwaukee Bucks).

Visit us on the web: http://www.NBAGLeague.com
Like us on Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/nbagleague
Follow us on Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/nbagleague
Follow us on Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/nbagleague

Lyrics:
IвАЩm on an island
Even when youвАЩre close
CanвАЩt take the silence
IвАЩd rather be alone
I think itвАЩs pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
ItвАЩs time I wave goodbye from the window
LetвАЩs end this like we should and say weвАЩre good

WeвАЩre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So letвАЩs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when youвАЩre with somebody else
As long as you swear you wonвАЩt be pissed when I do it myself 
LetвАЩs end it like we should and say weвАЩre good

No need to hide it 
Go get what you want
This wonвАЩt be a burden if we both donвАЩt hold a grudge

LetвАЩs end this like we should and say weвАЩre good

Not gonna judge you when youвАЩre with somebody else
As long as you swear you wonвАЩt be pissed when I do it myself 
LetвАЩs end it like we should and say weвАЩre good

Now youвАЩre holding this against me
Like I knew you would
I tried my best to make this easy
So donвАЩt give me that look just say weвАЩre good

WeвАЩre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So letвАЩs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when youвАЩre with somebody else
As long as you swear you wonвАЩt be pissed when I do it myself 
LetвАЩs end it like we should and say weвАЩre good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: Pangulong Duterte Nagluluksa sa Pagpanaw ni Bro. Eli Soriano
snippet.description:
Nagluluksa ngayon ang pamilya, mga miyembro at lahat ng nagmamahal kay Brother Eli Soriano ang overall servant ng Church Of God International. Pumanaw na kase ang Televangelist sa edad na 73. Kinumpirma ito mismo ng official facebook page ng Ang Dating Daant at Members of the Church Of God International.

Maging si Pangulong Rodrigo Duterte ay nagulat sa pagpanaw ni Bro. Eli. Isang pahayag ang ibinigay nito sa publiko at sa mga mahal sa buhay ng namatay na mangangaral.

Si Brother Eli ang host ng longest running religious show na Ang Dating Daan na sa kasalukuyan ay napapanood na sa mahigit pitumpung bansa sa pamamagitan ng ibat ibang wika.

Mas nakilala siya sa programang Itanong Mo Kay Soriano Biblia ang Sasagot kung saan pinupuna at itinatama niya ang mga maling aral ng ibang mga pastor.

Another year is dawning!
Chinese New YearвАЩs decorations, goods and snacks are ready for the big day.
Melon seeds, peanuts, candied haws, Sanzi (fried dough twists), and fried prawn crackers, to name a few.
A big hug for those who canвАЩt get together with their families back in the hometown.
IвАЩm convinced that infinite hope and luck
are sure to come in 2021!

snippet.title: Leche Flan Banana Cake .. Can This Be The Next Viral Recipe?
snippet.description:
The leche nana, a.k.a the next viral food trend? Here's how to make it at home!

Jump to:
Introduction (00:00)
Banana Cake (01:55)
Leche Flan (03:16)


Recipe:
For our banana cake youвАЩll need: 
- 1 ¬љ cup flour
- 1 cup packed brown sugar
- ¬љ tsp baking powder
- 1 tsp baking soda
- 1/2 tsp kosher salt
- 1/2 tsp cinnamon
- 130g browned butter
- 2 large eggs
- 1 ¬љ cup overripe bananas, mashed and measured. 
- ¬љ cup sour cream
- 1 tsp vanilla extract
--
1. Mix all the dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, baking soda, kosher salt, cinnamon. 
2. Mash the bananas and mix with brown sugar, browned butter, 2 egg yolks beated, sour cream and vanilla extract. 
3. Fold intro 2 egg whites beaten into soft peaks. 
--
For the leche flan, youвАЩll need:
- 10 egg yolks
- 340ml evaporated milk
- 285ml  sweetened condensed milk
- 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
- 1 tsp lime zest
- 10 tablespoons granulated sugar

INSTRUCTIONS
1.  Start by placing all the sugar in your baking pan. IвАЩm using a 9x3. Run this on your stove, slowly melting all of the sugar and making sure to not let it go too far. The most important thing is that the sugar granules are completely dissolve. After that, itвАЩs really your choice. The darker it is, the more bitter it will become. Take it off, right before itвАЩs the color you want it to be. Let this cool completely. 
2.  Place the egg yolks in a bowl, and slowly beat them with a fork. During this whole process, if you want a perfect, meaning no lump leche flan, you have to beat this really slowly, to make sure that no bubbles form. Add in your milks, vanilla extra and zest. If you want something really smooth. Pass this through a strainer. 
Put it together
1.  Place your leche flan mix in the baking dish. 
2.  Top slowly with banana mix. 
3.  160¬∞C/320¬∞F for about 45 minutes, in a bain marie, meaning in a tray filled with boiling water, reaching halfway up our cake pan. 
4.  Take out when cake reaches internal temp of 200F or a stick comes out clean.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: At least 100 injured after M7.3 quake strikes off NE Japan
snippet.description:
For  more:
https://news.cgtn.com/news/2021-02-14/At-least-100-injured-after-M7-3-quake-strikes-off-NE-Japan-XS06q6E5zi/index.html

At least 100 people were injured after a 7.3 magnitude earthquake struck off Japan's northeastern Fukushima Prefecture at 11:08 p.m. local time (1408 GMT) on Saturday, according to the Japan Meteorological Agency (JMA). A tsunami warning has not been issued so far. Tremors were also felt in Tokyo, according to a CGTN reporter in Japan. #Japan #Earthquake

snippet.title: Putragis na Pulis! Resibo lang nawala, Delivery Boy Tinorture, Naihi sa sakit!
snippet.description:
#ipaBITAGmo

Dahil lang sa nawawalang resibo, pinosasan, pinaluhod at binugbog hanggang sa maihi sa sakit ang isang delivery boy.

Ang nasa likod, ang kaniyang among pulis na may-ari ng tindahan ng LPG. 

Ang hinayupak, mismong sa loob ng presinto tinorture ang pobre!

Nadiskubre pa ng BITAG, ang tindahan ng LPG ng les-pu, hindi otorisado, walang lisensiya - iligal!

Panoorin ang nakakaawang sinapit ng delivery boy na ito sa kamay ng isang Pulis ng Teresa, Rizal.

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
WeвАЩve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and hereвАЩs what we created. ArenвАЩt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, letвАЩs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts youвАЩll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 вАФ How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 вАФ DIY ring 

2:48 вАФ Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 вАФ DIY hair comb 

6:53 вАФ Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 вАФ DIY fake nails

snippet.title: G League Ignite vs. Raptors 905 - Condensed Game
snippet.description:
The NBA G League is the NBA's official minor league. Fans can get a glimpse at the players, coaches and officials competing to ascend to the NBA's rank. With 40 percent of players on start-of-season NBA rosters boasting NBA G League experience when the 2018-19 season tipped off in October, the NBA G League YouTube Channel is the best place to see the future now.

The NBA G League consists of 27 teams for the 2018-19 season, all singly affiliated with an NBA franchise: Agua Caliente Clippers of Ontario (Los Angeles Clippers), Austin Spurs (San Antonio Spurs), Canton Charge (Cleveland Cavaliers), Capital City Go-Go (Washington Wizards), Delaware Blue Coats (Philadelphia 76ers), Erie BayHawks (Atlanta Hawks), Fort Wayne Mad Ants (Indiana Pacers), Grand Rapids Drive (Detroit Pistons), Greensboro Swarm (Charlotte Hornets), Iowa Wolves (Minnesota Timberwolves), Lakeland Magic (Orlando Magic), Long Island Nets (Brooklyn Nets), Maine Red Claws (Boston Celtics), Memphis Hustle (Memphis Grizzlies) Northern Arizona Suns (Phoenix Suns), Oklahoma City Blue (Oklahoma City Thunder), Raptors 905 (Toronto Raptors), Rio Grande Valley Vipers (Houston Rockets), Salt Lake City Stars (Utah Jazz), Santa Cruz Warriors (Golden State Warriors), Sioux Falls Skyforce (Miami Heat), South Bay Lakers (Los Angeles Lakers), Stockton Kings (Sacramento Kings), Texas Legends (Dallas Mavericks), Westchester Knicks (New York Knicks) and Wisconsin Herd (Milwaukee Bucks).

Visit us on the web: http://www.NBAGLeague.com

snippet.title: Robbers meet different fates after hitting courier service in Quezon City | 24 Oras
snippet.description:
A suspect was killed, another escaped and a third one was arrested after they robbed a branch of a courier service in Quezon City. According to Marisol AbdurahmanвАЩs report on вАЬ24 OrasвАЭ on Wednesday, the robbery led to an encounter with the police and resulted in the death of one of the suspects.

CCTV footage showed that police chased the suspects after the robbery of the LBC branch on Matalino Street. One of the suspects opened fire prompting the police to shoot back, killing him. Another escaped. Police arrested one of them, Leonardo Abando, and recovered P50,000 of the loot.

24 Oras is GMA NetworkвАЩs flagship newscast, anchored by Mike Enriquez, Mel Tiangco and Vicky Morales. It airs on GMA-7 Mondays to Fridays at 6:30 PM (PHL Time) and on weekends at 6:00 PM. For more videos from 24 Oras, visit http://www.gmanetwork.com/24oras.

For the latest updates about the COVID-19 pandemic (coronavirus disease 2019), click this link: https://www.gmanetwork.com/news/covid-19/

You can watch 24 Oras and other Kapuso programs overseas on GMA Pinoy TV. Visit https://www.gmanetwork.com/international to subscribe.

GMA promotes healthy debate and conversation online. Any abusive language that does not facilitate productive discourse will be blocked from this post.

snippet.title: CORPORAL, NAKABUNTIS NG GF, NAGTAGO SA SAYA NI MRS!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 13M followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!
